final:
module top_module(
  input reset,
  input EN,
  input TE,
  output reg ENCLK
);// Assuming TLATNTSCAX2TS is a standard latch or flip-flop which isn't available,
  // I will remove its instantiation and implement the functionality directly in always block.

  always @(posedge reset) begin
    if (EN && TE) begin
      ENCLK <= 1;
    end else begin
      ENCLK <= 0;
    end
  end

endmodule
